testcase.name: @BeforeClass setup

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. HTTP connect timed out Host info: host: 'SAPNISH', ip: '192.168.1.2'

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. HTTP connect timed out Host info: host: 'SAPNISH', ip: '192.168.1.2' at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.execute(RemoteWebDriver.java:622) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.Executors$RunnableAdapter.call(Executors.java:545) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:328) at java.net.http/jdk.internal.net.http.HttpClientImpl.send(HttpClientImpl.java:917) at java.net.http/jdk.internal.net.http.HttpClientFacade.send(HttpClientFacade.java:133) at testcase.name: @BeforeClass setup

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. HTTP connect timed out Host info: host: 'SAPNISH', ip: '192.168.1.2'
